case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. NICHOLAS WADE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF RAQUEL HERNANDEZ IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100097706) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $435.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100097706) AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS N WADE, AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100043347) AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS N WADE, AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WADE, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS N WADE, AN INDIVIDUAL $14,196.61 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,631.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100097706)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-14-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100043071), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK SERVED JAN-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JAN-05-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS N WADE, AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF MORDECHAI WOLOWITSCH RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 200005351) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK

DECLARATION OF MORDECHAI WOLOWITSCH RE: ACCOUNT FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND BRIEF SUMMARY OF CASE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1800 (TRANSACTION ID # 100097706) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION OF MORDECHAI WOLOWITSCH RE: COPIES OF DOCUMENTS IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 100097706) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK

DECLARATION OF MORDECHAI WOLOWITSCH, ESQ. IN COMPLIANCE WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 1.20 (B)(2)(A),(B) (TRANSACTION ID # 100097706) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE IN REGARDS TO ALL COUNTS; COUNT 2 : QUANTUM MERUIT (TRANSACTION ID # 100097706) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WADE, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS N WADE, AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-05-2019
